risk_note.tr: Cerezler, kaydedilmis sifreler ve eklentiler silinir. Onemli sifreleri once parola yoneticisine alin.
risk_note.en: Cookies, saved passwords, and extensions will be cleared. Move important passwords to a manager first.

body.tr: edge://settings/reset > 'Restore settings to their default values'. Bookmark'lar kalir, eklenti ve site izinleri sifirlanir.
body.en: edge://settings/reset > 'Restore settings to their default values'. Bookmarks remain; extensions and site permissions reset.

body.tr: chrome://settings/reset > 'Restore settings to their original defaults'. Eklentileri devre disi birakir (silmez), pinned tablari acilir gosterir.
body.en: chrome://settings/reset > 'Restore settings to their original defaults'. Disables extensions (doesn't remove), unpins tabs.

body.tr: about:support > 'Refresh Firefox' butonu. Yeni profil olusturup bookmark + sifreleri tasir; eklenti ve ozel ayarlari atar.
body.en: about:support > 'Refresh Firefox' button. Creates new profile, migrates bookmarks + passwords; drops extensions and custom settings.

body.tr: Sorun reset sonrasi devam ederse: %LOCALAPPDATA%\Microsoft\Edge\User Data klasorunu yeniden adlandir, tarayiciyi ac. Tum kullanici verisi (sifre, gecmis) silinir.
body.en: If issues persist after reset: rename %LOCALAPPDATA%\Microsoft\Edge\User Data folder, open browser. All user data (passwords, history) wiped.
